tasks.goal: Fix runtime Korean string corruption and keep runtime string verification active.
tasks.rollback_plan: restore workspace snapshot and remote target files if runtime string verification fails
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after the same guard passes again on another runtime string bug

tasks.goal: Ensure remote restore runs after upload succeeded but restart or later verification fails.
acceptance: restart failure restores remote state before next attempt
browser verification failure restores remote state
final failure restores remote target files
tasks.rollback_plan: restore workspace snapshot and re-upload original target files before retry
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after another deployment-related task proves the same rollback helper

tasks.goal: Strengthen success-feedback tasks so blocking dialogs cannot false-pass verification.
acceptance: verification contains at least one real assertion beyond screenshot
tasks.rollback_plan: restore the queue file if canonical task documentation becomes inconsistent
tasks.promotion_rule: promote after the same preset is reused in at least two real tasks
